name: X: Send DM
description: Open a recipient profile in a fresh tab, launch the DM composer, draft a first message, pause for human approval, then send. Use when you need to open a NEW DM conversation with a user by handle. Do not use when you already have an open thread URL (use `x_reply_dm_thread`).

browser_automation.description: Navigates a fresh tab to /{recipient_handle}, clicks the profile DM button, handles the X Chat passcode gate if shown, types the message, asserts the send control is enabled, and pauses at the review gate before sending.

sequences.name: x_send_dm
sequences.description: Open profile -> open DM composer -> (onboarding gate) -> type message -> verify send enabled -> pause for review -> send.

steps.name: Open the recipient profile in a fresh tab
Allow the profile page to settle
Wait for the profile DM button
steps.selector: div[role='button'][data-testid='sendDMFromProfile'], button[data-testid='sendDMFromProfile'], a[href*='/messages/compose'], button[aria-label*='Message' i], a[aria-label*='Message' i]

steps.name: Open the DM composer
steps.selector: div[role='button'][data-testid='sendDMFromProfile'], button[data-testid='sendDMFromProfile'], a[href*='/messages/compose'], button[aria-label*='Message' i], a[aria-label*='Message' i]

steps.name: Wait for the DM composer or X Chat onboarding gate
Pause if X Chat requires passcode setup
steps.message: If X Chat asks you to create a passcode, finish that setup now. Otherwise click Continue immediately.
steps.instructions: After the passcode gate is cleared, the workflow will wait for the DM composer and continue typing.

steps.name: Wait for the DM composer after onboarding is cleared
Activate the DM composer with a trusted click
Allow the DM caret to settle
Confirm the DM send control is enabled
Pause for review before sending the DM
steps.message: DM draft is ready. Click Continue only if you want to send it.
steps.instructions: If you do not want to send this message, stop the workflow instead of waiting for the timeout.

steps.name: Allow the DM send to settle
Read the final DM composer state
steps.script: const normalize = (value) => (value || '').replace(/\u00a0/g, ' ').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const composer = document.querySelector("div[data-testid='dmComposerTextInput'], div[role='textbox'][data-testid='dmComposerTextInput'], div[role='textbox'][contenteditable='true']"); return { url: location.href, composer_text: composer ? normalize(composer.textContent || '') : null, send_button_present: !!document.querySelector("button[data-testid='dmComposerSendButton'], div[role='button'][data-testid='dmComposerSendButton'], button[aria-label*='Send' i]"), pin_onboarding_present: !!document.querySelector("button[data-testid='pin-onboarding-setup-now']") };

help.summary: Open a new DM with a handle and send a message after human approval.

parameters.name: recipient_handle
parameters.description: Recipient X handle without the leading @.

examples.command: rzn-browser run x send-dm --param recipient_handle="jack" --param message_text="Today's a great day"
examples.description: Send a first DM to a handle after confirming at the review gate.

notes: Mutating. Two gates: one for passcode setup (if shown), one for send approval.
Opens a fresh tab; parallel DM sends to different handles are safe.
Recipient must accept DMs from the authenticated user for the Message button to exist.
